description_long: This is an upright piano with a classic, elegant design, featuring a polished black wooden exterior adorned with gold decorative accents. The front panel displays the brand name 'Cresher Instruments' above a full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys. The piano stands on four sturdy, carved legs and includes two brass pedals at the base. The rear panel is mostly solid with a wooden diagonal pattern and two protruding supports. The top lid is closed, and there is no visible music stand. The overall appearance suggests a traditional acoustic upright piano suitable for indoor or public urban spaces.
description: A polished black upright piano with gold accents, full keyboard, and two brass pedals, featuring a closed lid and classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, gold brand name, decorative accents, and two brass pedals.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the piano's depth, closed lid, and the profile of the legs and keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid back panel with a wooden diagonal pattern and two support structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same depth and profile as the other side, with the keyboard and legs visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full-sized keyboard with 52 white keys and 36 black keys arranged in the traditional pattern.
